name: Olive Garden Shrimp Scampi Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the bottled Italian dressing, dry mustard, Tabasco sauce, and ketchup until smooth.
2. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container.
3. Store in the refrigerator for up to one week or freeze for up to four months.
4. Thaw in the refrigerator before using.
